text: What if you could see heat? You can, in a way. Infrared radiation is all around us. It's the heat we can sense but can't see. Cameras detect infrared differently than your skin. Why does that matter? While your skin feels the warmth, special cameras can visualize it, revealing hidden details. Infrared isn't just heat; it’s a glimpse into a world we often overlook. Curious about more hidden science? Hit follow for more insights!
